question: The chart shows average student test scores from 2010 to 2020 on a 0–100 scale. What is the most accurate description of the trend over this period?

options.A: Student performance showed a slight overall decline
options.B: Student performance stayed exactly the same every year
options.D: Student performance experienced a sharp decline

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (71.55–73.18) instead of a more informative 0–100 context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 1.63 over the period, which is modest in the full context.
